_comment: Mode-to-visual configuration. Canonical source: vault/Reference — Mode-to-Visual Configuration.md. Keep in sync manually until generation is automated.

spatial-reasoning.notes: Annotations overlaid on user's original input; preserves spatial arrangement.

strategic-interaction.notes: Decision tree here is a game tree.

root-cause-analysis.notes: CLD only when loops are present in the causal chain.

benefits-analysis.notes: Tornado for quantified benefit claims; pro_con for qualitative PMI assembly.

synthesis.notes: Concept map captures structural parallels between frameworks.

passion-exploration.notes: Visual is for navigation, not argument. Annotate-only adversarial.

cui-bono.notes: Flowchart for interest-flow tracing; concept map for institutional structure.

steelman-construction.notes: Linguistically native. The steelman is prose.

deep-clarification.notes: Flowchart only when the mechanism is itself spatial/procedural; otherwise no_visual.

paradigm-suspension.notes: Questioning assumptions is linguistic; a diagram would force premature commitment.

project-mode.notes: Project Mode inherits visual configuration from the analytical mode it serves. Visual types and strictness are resolved at dispatch time based on the underlying mode.

structured-output.notes: Structured Output renders existing content. Passes through visuals from source; does not generate new visuals.

red-team.notes: Annotated overlay only when input contains a diagram to be attacked; otherwise prose-only. Pick the type matching the user's input structure (feedback loops → causal_loop_diagram; sequential steps → flowchart; typed propositions → concept_map). Severity coded via dual encoding (colour + prefix label in callout text) for WCAG and colour-blind safety. canvas_action is annotate, never replace. Depth (Internal) and Breadth (External) findings consolidate into one envelope per turn.
